description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image and a docker:dind service, setting DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single build stage and a build job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script of the build job, echo the $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD into docker login -u $DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN --password-stdin and create a BuildKit builder with docker buildx create --driver=docker-container --name=buildkit-builder --use. Then in the script run make. No caches, artifacts, or deployments are defined.
